title: Performa
description:
This modpack optimizes Minecraft to boost FPS and improve world loading speeds. It generates chunks only when needed, enhancing overall performance. It has been tested on various devices. 

For more information read the description
body:
# Minecraft Performance Modpack

**This modpack is designed to optimize Minecraft for maximum performance, providing a significant FPS boost, faster world loading, and overall smoother gameplay. Thanks to advanced optimizations, chunks are only generated when necessary, reducing resource consumption and improving stability.**

---
## ⚠️Important!:⚠️

~~If you experience low framerate consider to deactivate async because as the mod description states following part **_"Async is a Fabric mod designed to improve entity performance by processing them in parallel using multiple CPU cores and threads._**~~ **In newer versions Async isnt used anymore.**

---
## Setup:
**🛠 Installing with Prism Launcher, MultiMC, Modrinth APP or GDLauncher
Download the .mrpack file.**

Open Prism Launcher, MultiMC or Modrinth APP.
Click "Add Instance" → "Import from MRPack/File".
Select the downloaded .mrpack file and start the modpack.

---
### Features:

✅ **Higher FPS for a smoother experience**

✅ **Faster world loading and reduced lag**

✅ **Optimized chunk rendering for better performance**

✅ **Improved memory management to prevent crashes**

---

### Tested on:

**Gaming PC (Ryzen 5 3600X, RTX 3060, 64GB RAM)**

**Gaming Notebook (i7-10750H, GTX 1660 Ti Max-Q, 16GB RAM)**

**Notebook (Ryzen 7 4000U, Radeon Vega, 16GB RAM)**

**ASUS ROG ALLY Z1 Extreme**

**Notebook: i5-4210u with an gtx 850m (used UbuntuOS)**

### Experience Minecraft like never before — optimized for speed and stability!

## [Wiki](https://varam0s.github.io/Performa/index.html)

### If you are a mod developer and do not want your mod to be included in my modpack, please contact me and I will remove it as soon as possible. You can find my contact details in my [Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Varamos)
